name: The Unstoppable Yawn
overview: With the greatest father-son battle on earth concluded, Baki experiences overwhelming boredom. Meanwhile, Tokugawa advances his unprecedented experiment.

name: THE BEAT
overview: As the other martial artists battle restlessness, Kaoru Hanayama asks Tokugawa for a favor. Deep underground, the cloning project enters its final phase.

name: The Countenance of Musashi
overview: As Professor John accepts Sabuko's arcane methods against scientific reasoning, Hanayama gears up for an all-out fistfight with Yujiro on Tokyo's streets.

name: Boy
overview: After facing Japan's greatest modern swordsman, the peerless Musashi Miyamoto demands the most skilled fighters in the country. Baki steps forward.

name: Otherworldly Strength
overview: Baki unleashes his fastest strike — but the samurai is faster. Later, as Musashi roams the city, his actions catch the attention of other martial artists.

name: Real Sword
overview: The first to move is Doppo Orochi. After a brief tussle, he asks Musashi to use a real blade. How will God's Hand fare against the sword saint's steel?

name: Feather
overview: Sea King Retsu arrives to face Musashi and trains intensively under the watchful eye of Sea Emperor Kaku to master the secret technique: Xiaoli.

name: You Are Defeated!
overview: The battle between kenpo master Retsu and sword master Musashi Miyamoto begins! While Retsu unleashes long-range weapon attacks, Musashi closes in!?

name: Sea King Retsu
overview: Barely standing after Musashi's barrage of brutal attacks, Retsu forces his broken body forward and adopts a familiar stance. Can he turn the tide?

name: Sekigahara
overview: The deathmatch between Retsu and Musashi comes to a devastatingly brutal conclusion. Baki visits Izo Motobe for guidance and flies into a rage.

name: Buddy
overview: After defeating Japan's kendo champ, Musashi faces jujutsu master Goki Shibukawa, who greets the samurai with a firm handshake — and a punch to the face.

name: Tough Body
overview: The strongest being on Earth clashes with the strongest samurai in history at the Tokugawa estate! Yujiro demands Musashi face him with two swords.

name: Practical Fighter
overview: Jack Hammer arrives at the Tokugawa estate hoping to fight Musashi, but first must defeat Motobe, who's determined to be the next to take on the samurai.

name: Pickle
overview: To prevent further chaos, Pickle is sedated and brought to the Skytree lab. Musashi shocks everyone by slapping the prehistoric man in the face.

name: Death Match
overview: Tokugawa reunites Musashi with his legendary blade and meets with a resolute Motobe. Meanwhile, Pickle starves himself for the upcoming match.

name: The Beast and the Warrior
overview: The Sengoku era's strongest swordsman clashes with the Cretaceous' mightiest warrior — but what happens when Pickle himself takes up a sword?

name: Protection
overview: At last, Motobe sees the culmination of his years of training. He throws every trick from the Sengoku period at Musashi to protect his comrades.

name: Cutting Off the Country
overview: After Musashi "slashes" the host on national TV, the Japanese police move to apprehend him. The samurai leaves the Tokugawa mansion and begins a rampage.

name: Un-Severable
overview: The bloodbath continues as Musashi cuts through a platoon of the police's elite. Meanwhile, the President of the USA prepares for a meeting with Yujiro.

name: For the Country
overview: Musashi continues to resist, leaving a mountain of bodies in his wake. Later, Police Commissioner Utsumi asks one unlikely person to fight for the nation.

name: The Scar and the Sword
overview: In Shinjuku, Hanayama stares into endless darkness and takes his signature stance. As he swings, Musashi seems blinded by his pure fighting spirit...

name: That Man, Hanayama
overview: Punching, pinning, crushing — Hanayama throws everything he has at Musashi. But can his iron muscles withstand every cut, slice and rip Musashi inflicts?

name: Eliminate
overview: Baki resolves to eradicate the samurai from this world and hones his body at a dojo. Meanwhile, Musashi prepares for the match with a visit to the sewers.

name: Exquisite Skill
overview: The day of the showdown arrives. Before this once-in-a-lifetime match begins, an unimaginable sight unfolds before Musashi. Baki is ready to let loose.

name: The Way of the Sword
overview: Musashi retaliates brutally, proving that even barehanded, he is unmatched under heaven. But Baki will not back down until he buries the samurai.
